title: neoancistrophyllum majus
intro: Neoancistrophyllum majus, also known as the giant fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dipteridaceae. It is a large, deciduous fern that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Neoancistrophyllum majus are believed to include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Neoancistrophyllum majus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically made from the leaves and stems of the plant.
